groups.name: Admin
groups.description: Members of the Admin group may see and edit anything, having full access.

groups.name: Data-Access-Manager
groups.description: Members of the Data-Access-Manager group may see all patient data, but cannot edit it or add new data. Furthermore, they can control access via the network in the form of queries or federated learning. They have access to all logs.

groups.name: Data-Admin
groups.description: Members of the Data-Admin group may read, edit and add patient data. Furthermore, they may see all logs related to the addition, updating or removal of patient data.

clientScopes.name: basic
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add all basic claims to the token

clientScopes.name: organization
clientScopes.description: Additional claims about the organization a subject belongs to

clientScopes.name: federated-learning-websocket-access
clientScopes.description: This is used internally by the system to receive an access token to give to apps so that their communication can be to a protected access point.

clientScopes.name: service_account
clientScopes.description: Specific scope for a client enabled for service accounts

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token
